Content-Type: text/plain; name="p5-PostScript.shar"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="p5-PostScript.shar"

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	p5-PostScript
#	p5-PostScript/Makefile
#	p5-PostScript/distinfo
#	p5-PostScript/pkg-descr
#	p5-PostScript/pkg-plist
#
echo c - p5-PostScript
mkdir -p p5-PostScript > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - p5-PostScript/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >p5-PostScript/Makefile << 'END-of-p5-PostScript/Makefile'
X# Ports collection makefile for:	p5-PostScript
X# Date created:				10.Jun.2008
X# Whom:					fernan
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	PostScript
XPORTVERSION=	0.06
XCATEGORIES=	print perl5
XMASTER_SITES=	CPAN
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
X
XMAINTAINER=	perl@FreeBSD.org
XCOMMENT=	PostScript - Produce PostScript files from Perl
X
XPERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
X
XMAN3=	PostScript::TextBlock.3 PostScript::Elements.3 PostScript::Metrics.3
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-p5-PostScript/Makefile
echo x - p5-PostScript/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >p5-PostScript/distinfo << 'END-of-p5-PostScript/distinfo'
XMD5 (PostScript-0.06.tar.gz) = 2a91cc23f2d8958e063f7ff09163faa0
XSHA256 (PostScript-0.06.tar.gz) =
64aa477ebf153710e4cd1251a0fa6f964ac34fcd3d9993e299e28064f9eec589
XSIZE (PostScript-0.06.tar.gz) = 19506
END-of-p5-PostScript/distinfo
echo x - p5-PostScript/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >p5-PostScript/pkg-descr << 'END-of-p5-PostScript/pkg-descr'
XPostScript allows you to write PostScript files from Perl.
XIt has graphics primitives that allow lines, circles and boxes to be drawn.
X
XWWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/PostScript/
END-of-p5-PostScript/pkg-descr
echo x - p5-PostScript/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >p5-PostScript/pkg-plist << 'END-of-p5-PostScript/pkg-plist'
X%%SITE_PERL%%/PostScript/Document.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/PostScript/Elements.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/PostScript/TextBlock.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/PostScript/Metrics.pm
X%%SITE_PERL%%/PostScript/example.pl
X%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/PostScript/Metrics/.packlist
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/PostScript
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/PostScript/Metrics
X@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/PostScript
END-of-p5-PostScript/pkg-plist
exit
